26.04.12.description:
# All Setlists - Updated to Version 1.4
- Added LEGO Rock Band
- Oye Mi Amor has been made part of the main Rock Band 3 setlist instead of its own setlist.

### Guitar Hero 1 - no change
### Guitar Hero World Tour - no change
# Rock Band 3 - Updated to Version 1.3
- Oye Mi Amor has been made part of the main Rock Band 3 setlist instead of its own setlist.

# LEGO Rock Band - Initial Release
- Supports Guitar, Bass, Drums, and Vocals
- 45 songs total
26.04.12.title: LEGO Rock Band Release

26.05.04.description:
# All Setlists - updated to 1.5
- Added YARG Official Setlist wave 15 (not its own setlist. Included in YARG Official Setlist)
- Added Creative Commons Hero (port)
- Added Guitar Hero 2
- Added GH2 360 Exclusives
- Added GH2 Co-op
- Added Rock Band 2

# Guitar Hero 2 - Initial Release
It is highly recommended that you read the primary Github readme for the additional notes on setting up this game.

Supports Guitar, Bass, and Rhythm

Included setlists
- Guitar Hero 2
- GH2 360 Exclusives
- GH2 Co-op

# Rock Band 2 - Initial Release
Supports Guitar, Bass, Drums, and Vocals

Included setlists
- Rock Band 2

### Guitar Hero 1 - no change
### Guitar Hero World Tour - no change
### Rock Band 3 - no change
### LEGO Rock Band - no change
26.05.04.title: Guitar Hero 2, Rock Band 2, and Creative Commons Hero
